title: LeftBehind
description: Left Behind adds mysterious ruins, fragmented tools, and a unique crafting system that lets you reforge relics with enchantments stronger than vanilla - but always at a cost, echoing the fate of those who sought them before.
body:
# 🗝️ Left Behind - Mod
Lost fragments, hidden ruins, and tools stronger than anything seen before.
![LeftBehind-Banner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c55ae76caf565ae0e1f5eab868ed6648ca7862a_0.webp)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/exiOQqp6sY0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 📖 The Forgotten Tale

Long ago, before the world was as we know it, a traveler named Thalen wandered across endless lands in search of relics whispered about in half-burned scrolls and half-remembered songs. These were not mere tools, but fragments of something greater - handles of lost hammers, joints of broken blades, and heads of shattered picks.

In his journal - the Lost Pages - Thalen wrote of a secret:

“The fragments yearn to be whole. When brought together, they awaken… stronger than they once were. Yet beware - for when I drew near, I felt a presence watching me. And as my hand touched the last piece, the air turned cold. I saw nothing, but I knew… I was not alone.”

The pages end abruptly there.
No body was ever found. Only ruins, overgrown with moss and silence, and the scattered fragments of a forgotten age.

They say the watcher still lingers - that the tools themselves carry a power so sharp, it cuts the very balance of the world. And when reforged, something… or someone… is always left behind.
![LeftBehind-Banner2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9aa631ed63dd05b2c59e7fe871784ceddbc97f14_0.webp)

## 🔍 What the Mod Adds

- Mysterious Structures - Ruins hidden across the overworld, holding dangers, fragments, and whispers of the past.
- Fragmented Tools - Gather handles, joints, and heads to reforge ancient equipment.
- Unique Crafting Block - Combine fragments inside a special block to restore them into powerful relics.
- Stronger Enchantments - Each reforged tool spawns with a random vanilla enchantment that is one tier stronger than the game normally allows.
- A Price to Power - These reforged tools cannot be combined further. Each relic is one-of-a-kind.

## ⚔️ Suggested Gameplay

For the best experience, use Left Behind together with mods like:

- Mending Remover - so relics retain their rarity and weight. [Mending Remover](https://modrinth.com/mod/mendingremover)
- Durability Rarity - to make reforged tools feel more balanced and meaningful. [Durability Rarity](https://modrinth.com/mod/durabilityrarity)

![MendingRemover-Banner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aa14c5272a3b49c057802fed57887fd2cedfb47_0.webp)
![DurabilityRarity-Banner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b867a1e9a60b87334a093913c53138b895094da8_0.webp)

![license_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcb02ac17ea39fe83ef86a51c0ab0681e7cec489.webp)
